---
name: New iPerf3 Server Request
about: Suggest a new public iPerf3 server to be added to the list.
title: "[New Server]: "
labels: Add iperf3-server
assignees: ''

---

Please provide the technical details of the server:

* **IP / Hostname:** 
* **Port / Port Range:** (Port ranges are highly preferred to ensure availability)
* **Speed:** (e.g., 1 Gbps, 10 Gbps)
* **Options:** `-R` (Reverse / Download), `-6` (IPv6 Support), `-u` (UDP Support)
* **Continent:** 
* **Country:** 
 * **Site:** 
* **Provider:**

**Testing & Acceptance**
To ensure reliability, all servers must pass our [testing process](https://github.com/R0GGER/public-iperf3-servers/blob/main/testing_process.md#acceptance).
